summary: The New Zealand vs South Africa 2nd T20I has concluded with New Zealand winning by 68 runs to level the series 1-1. Several major UEFA Champions League football matches are scheduled for this evening, including Arsenal vs Leverkusen, Man City vs Real Madrid, and Chelsea vs PSG, all around 20:00 UTC. There are also numerous English lower-league football fixtures scheduled around 19:45 UTC.
